items.summary: Add a new backend function `upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin(code : Text)` to the existing main actor. If `code == "NAMMA5600"`, overwrite the caller's stored role to `#admin` (or the equivalent AppRole variant used in the existing schema) in the existing user profile storage (the same HashMap/storage used by the current role getter/checker). Return a success result. If the code does not match, return an error result with message "Invalid admin code". This function must overwrite any existing role (customer, driver, or admin) without restriction.

Add a new frontend route `/admin/upgrade` to the existing TanStack Router configuration in `frontend/src/App.tsx`. This route must require only that the user is logged in (no role restriction). The page must render: a title "Admin Upgrade", a text input labelled "Enter Admin Setup Code", and a button labelled "Upgrade to Admin". On button click, call the backend `upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin` function with the entered code. On success, redirect the user to `/admin/dashboard`. On failure, display the error message returned by the backend. This route must NOT be linked or referenced anywhere in the UI — it is accessible by direct URL only.
